_README: Outcomes recorded against the regex-stub verifier (api/_woogoros-verifier.js). When Theia's receipt LoRA replaces the stub (~mid-May 2026), expectations should improve materially. Most of today's FAIL/REVIEW outcomes are caused by two known bugs: (1) TOTAL_RE doesn't match compound labels like 'Total Project Cost Estimate' or 'Total Cost of Repairs'; (2) KEYWORDS dictionaries miss common receipt-language and OCR'd line items (e.g., 'control arm', 'ball joint', 'fuel injector' aren't in KEYWORDS.auto_repair). Update this file when Theia drops to lock the new baseline.

hvac-clean-invoice.jpeg._note: Clean digital screenshot. Verifier MISSES total ('Total job price $610' — TOTAL_RE doesn't match compound labels). Subtotal extracts cleanly. No date in screenshot. REVIEW because trust low (49) without total bonus or date bonus.

hvac-coil-quote.jpeg._note: Clean digital. Total + subtotal extract cleanly. No date, no merchant heuristic match. Trust 66 just under PASS threshold. REVIEW.

auto-paper-photo.jpeg._note: Real phone photo of paper estimate (JEEP body shop). OCR works (753 chars). MISSES total ('Total Cost of Repairs 732.39' — compound-label bug). KEYWORDS.auto_repair doesn't match 'Body Labor / Subtotal / Total Cost of Repairs / Deductible' accounting language. vertical_mismatch fatal. FAIL.

audi-screenshot.jpg._note: Partial digital screenshot — user scrolled, no total in visible region. Verifier finds no total/subtotal. False-positive merchant heuristic on 'FRONT AND REAR ALIGNMENT'. REVIEW.

auto-equinox-quote.jpeg._note: Clean digital quote (2014 Chevrolet Equinox, MasterPro control arm). Total $585.70 + Tax $38.32 extract cleanly. KEYWORDS.auto_repair MISSES 'control arm', 'ball joint', 'labor' which is what's in the OCR — vertical_mismatch fatal. FAIL despite strong field extraction. Theia should fix.

auto-honda-paper-photo.jpeg._note: Real phone photo of paper Honda CR-V work order (highlighter on key fields, slight glare). OCR got 381 chars from a difficult image. Total $2,054.91 extracts cleanly. KEYWORDS.auto_repair MISSES 'fuel injector', 'Honda', 'CR-V' — vertical_mismatch fatal. Same bug class as equinox quote.

roofing-gaf-quote.jpeg._note: FIRST PASS in the test set. GAF Timberline roof quote, $16,765.79. Strong roofing keywords (GAF, Timberline, Shingle, Roof, Ridge). Total + subtotal both extract correctly. Only signal missing is date. Trust 75 -> PASS.

roofing-scope-doc.png._note: Page 2 of 3 of a roofing scope document, $14,800 total. TOTAL_RE doesn't match 'Total Project Cost Estimate $14,800.00' (compound label bug). Vertical OK (Malarkey, shingle, roof). REVIEW.

utility-water-bill.jpeg._note: Edge case: city water utility bill (NOT a contractor receipt). Phone-photo of paper. OCR got 1988 chars but TOTAL_RE doesn't match 'Total Current Charges 154.17' or 'Total Due if Paid by'. Date 2025-09-15 extracts. KEYWORDS.plumbing matches 'sewer' so vertical check passes. REVIEW. The harness now records that the verifier WOULD let utility bills through if other signals were stronger — worth knowing.
